## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm test`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Home Assistant App metadata or Docker behavior checked when relevant

## Privacy and security

- [ ] No household names, entity IDs, camera frames, audio, private URLs, API
      keys, tokens, local databases, or `/data` files are included.
- [ ] New external data flows and permissions are documented.
- [ ] Cloud image transfer remains disabled until explicit user consent.
